[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] '''Pertaal Logris''' served the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. By [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], Logris was serving in the [[Moff Sarne's forces|forces]] of [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne]], an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] who ruled the [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. Under Sarne, Logris was in command of the [[Charis Fleet]]—the largest military [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] formation assigned to the [[Sector/Legends|sector]]—and was one of Sarne's staunchest supporters.

==Biography==
Pertaal Logris was an [[Imperial officer/Legends|officer]] serving in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] who rose to the [[Military rank/Legends|rank]] of [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]].<ref name="TDC" /> By [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]],<ref name="Date">The events of ''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]'' take place four [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], which equates to [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]] per ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> Logris was serving in [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne]]'s [[Moff Sarne's forces|forces]] in the [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. Sarne had established himself as a [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] following the [[Death/Legends|death]] of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] at the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], and the subsequent fracturing of [[Imperial High Command/Legends|Imperial authority]], by quietly withdrawing his [[Sector/Legends|sector]] from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]]. Under Sarne, Logris commanded the [[Charis Fleet]], the largest military formation in the sector, consisting of several [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]] and smaller [[Starship/Legends|vessels]] based on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Charis]].<ref name="TDC" />

In 8 ABY,<ref name="Date" /> Sarne was [[Battle of Kal'Shebbol|ousted]] from his [[Capital/Legends|capital]], [[Kal'Shebbol/Legends|Kal'Shebbol]], by [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[New Republic task force (Kal'Shebbol)|forces]] as part of their [[DarkStryder Campaign|military offensive]] against him. As the Moff fled into the depths of the Kathol sector, Sarne ordered the Charis Fleet to be broken down into smaller task forces to undertake missions to undermine the New Republic's efforts to expand their sphere of influence in the region through both [[Diplomat/Legends|diplomatic]] and military missions.<ref name="TDC" />

==Personality and traits==
Admiral Logris was a competent military commander, capable of effectively managing a large [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] of ships of varying class. The Admiral also firmly believed in Moff Sarne's goals and ideals to resurrect the Empire, and was one of his staunchest supporters.<ref name="TDC" />

==Behind the scenes==
Pertaal Logris was mentioned in ''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]'', an [[Roleplaying game|RPG]] sourcebook published by [[West End Games]] in [[1995]], as background information regarding the disposition of Imperial forces in the Kathol sector.<ref name="TDC" />
